violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Clean in place equipment need to be cleaned more thoroughly.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sani Bucket was at 0ppm when tested.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - floor throughout needs attention to detail.
